ucs.title: [LLM] Group5 commodity RAT install chain — script/document parent drops EXE to AppData and self-registers Run key (njRAT / NanoCore)
ucs.description: Detects the canonical install footprint of njRAT and NanoCore — the two commodity RATs Citizen Lab tied to Group5's Syrian-opposition spearphishing campaigns. The detection ties together the spearphish-spawned dropper (script host, Office app, or installer) creating an .exe in AppData with the same binary being registered as HKCU Run/RunOnce persistence within minutes — the deterministic install pattern of both njRAT (HKCU\...\Run, AppData\Roaming) and NanoCore (HKCU\...\Run, AppData\Roaming\<GUID>\<random>.exe).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as drop_time values(Filesystem.file_path) as dropped_file values(Filesystem.file_name) as dropped_name values(Filesystem.process_name) as dropper_proc values(Filesystem.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action=created AND (Filesystem.file_path="*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\*") AND Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" AND Filesystem.process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","hh.exe","rundll32.exe") by Filesystem.dest | rename Filesystem.dest AS dest | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as reg_time values(Registry.registry_path) as reg_key values(Registry.registry_value_name) as reg_value_name values(Registry.registry_value_data) as reg_value_data values(Registry.process_name) as reg_writer from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.action=modified AND (Registry.registry_path="*\\CurrentVersion\\Run*" OR Registry.registry_path="*\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce*") AND (Registry.registry_value_data="*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\AppData\\Local\\*") AND Registry.registry_value_data="*.exe" by Registry.dest | rename Registry.dest AS dest] | eval delay_sec = reg_time - drop_time | where delay_sec >= 0 AND delay_sec <= 600 | eval persisted_path_matches_drop = if(like(reg_value_data, "%".dropped_name."%"), 1, 0) | where persisted_path_matches_drop=1 | table drop_time, reg_time, delay_sec, dest, user, dropper_proc, dropped_file, reg_key, reg_value_name, reg_value_data, reg_writer | sort - drop_time
ucs.kql:
// Group5 — njRAT / NanoCore install chain: AppData drop + same-binary Run-key persistence within 10 minutes
let lookback = 7d;
let WindowMinutes = 10m;
let SuspiciousParents = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","hh.exe","rundll32.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let DroppedExe = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\")
    | where FileName endswith ".exe"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (SuspiciousParents)
    | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"          // exclude machine accounts
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              DroppedFolder = FolderPath, DroppedName = FileName,
              DroppedSHA256 = SHA256,
              DropperProc = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              DropperCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              DropperUser = InitiatingProcessAccountName;
let RunKeyPersist = DeviceRegistryEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
    | where RegistryKey has_any (@"\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run",
                                 @"\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce")
    | where RegistryValueData has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\")
        and RegistryValueData endswith ".exe"
    | project RegTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
              RegInitiator    = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              RegInitiatorCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
DroppedExe
| join kind=inner RunKeyPersist on DeviceId
| where RegTime between (DropTime .. DropTime + WindowMinutes)
| where RegistryValueData has DroppedName                       // persisted value points at the just-dropped binary
| project DropTime, RegTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', RegTime, DropTime),
          DeviceName, DropperUser,
          DropperProc, DropperCmd,
          DroppedFolder, DroppedName, DroppedSHA256,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
          RegInitiator, RegInitiatorCmd
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Group5 — njRAT / NanoCore install chain (Sentinel ASIM port; assumes MDE/Sysmon ingestion via ImFileEvent + ImRegistryEvent)
let lookback = 7d;
let WindowMinutes = 10m;
let SuspiciousParents = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","hh.exe","rundll32.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let DroppedExe = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".exe"
    | where ActingProcessName has_any (SuspiciousParents)
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              DroppedFilePath = TargetFilePath,
              DroppedName = TargetFileName,
              DroppedSHA256 = TargetFileSHA256,
              DropperProc = ActingProcessName,
              DropperCmd  = ActingProcessCommandLine,
              DropperUser = ActorUsername;
let RunKeyPersist = ImRegistryEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
    | where RegistryKey has_any (@"\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run",
                                 @"\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce")
    | where RegistryValueData has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\")
        and RegistryValueData endswith ".exe"
    | project RegTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
              RegInitiator    = ActingProcessName,
              RegInitiatorCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine;
DroppedExe
| join kind=inner RunKeyPersist on DvcHostname
| where RegTime between (DropTime .. DropTime + WindowMinutes)
| where RegistryValueData has DroppedName
| project DropTime, RegTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', RegTime, DropTime),
          DvcHostname, DropperUser,
          DropperProc, DropperCmd,
          DroppedFilePath, DroppedName, DroppedSHA256,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
          RegInitiator, RegInitiatorCmd
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.rationale: Group5 (G0043) is a low-sophistication, suspected-Iranian-nexus actor whose entire intrusion toolkit is commodity RATs — njRAT, NanoCore and Android DroidJack — distributed via spearphishing and watering-hole drops to Syrian-opposition targets. Citizen Lab's reverse engineering of the Group5 samples documented two install footprints that this UC anchors on: njRAT writing itself to %AppData%\Roamin
